entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Pour supprimer vos informations personnelles, nous supprimerons les informations que nous détenons à votre sujet à la date de votre demande et demanderons aux prestataires concernés d’en faire autant. Dans certains cas, la suppression peut être effectuée par dépersonnalisation. Si vous choisissez cette suppression, certaines fonctions nécessitant ces informations peuvent ne plus être disponibles. Pour arrêter la vente de vos informations personnelles, sachez que nous ne vendons ni ne louons vos informations personnelles à des tiers et ne les vendons pas contre rémunération. Dans certaines circonstances, un transfert sans contrepartie financière peut toutefois être considéré comme une « vente » au regard du droit californien. Vous pouvez demander la divulgation ou la suppression de vos Données personnelles à tout moment. Si vous demandez l’arrêt de telles ventes ou transferts, nous cesserons ces transferts. Cela peut affecter votre expérience ou votre accès à certains programmes, mais nous ne vous discriminerons jamais pour l’exercice de vos droits. Pour exercer les droits californiens décrits ci-dessus, envoyez votre demande à support@inspir.app. Ces droits sont couverts par le CCPA, le California Consumer Privacy Act. Pour en savoir plus, consultez le site officiel California Legislative Information. Le CCPA est entré en vigueur le 01/01/2020.

entries.source: Treat each turn as collaborative work: draft, critique, revise, ask for a decision, update open questions, and hand the next useful move to either the user or AI. Challenge weak ideas when the selected mode calls for it.
entries.value: Traitez chaque tour comme un travail collaboratif : rédiger, critiquer, réviser, demander une décision, mettre à jour les questions ouvertes et confier le prochain geste utile soit à l’utilisateur, soit à l’IA. Remettez en question les idées faibles lorsque le mode choisi le demande.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Transformez un concept, un argument, un problème, un texte ou une décision en une chaîne de questions ciblées. Votre partenaire écoute chaque réponse, identifie les hypothèses et les lacunes, et vous pousse vers votre propre synthèse finale. Essayez : "Aide-moi à comprendre le coût d'opportunité."

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Contrairement à un chatbot générique, inspir organise l’IA autour de modes d’apprentissage afin que les apprenants commencent avec le type d’aide dont ils ont besoin : indices, questions, quiz, rappel actif, jeu de rôle, débat ou retour.

entries.source: Use
entries.value: Utiliser

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: Utilisez "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: Utiliser des pauses de 50/10

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: Utilisez a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: Utilisez a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.

entries.value: Utilisez a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.

entries.value: Utilisez a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Utilisez a mode tuned for indices, questions, quiz, flashcards, retours d’écriture, or planning.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: Utilisez a prompt starter

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Utilisez a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: Utilisez a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Utilisez AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Utilisez AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: Utilisez AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: Utilisez AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Utilisez AI for indices, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
entries.value: Utilisez AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Utilisez AI for the thinking around the answer

entries.source: Use AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and evidence labels without confusing roleplay for sources.
entries.value: Utilisez AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and preuves labels without confusing roleplay for sources.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: Utilise le coaching IA pour les devoirs afin d'obtenir des indices, des vérifications d'étapes, du raisonnement mathématique et des retours d'écriture, tout en gardant le travail final à toi.

entries.source: Use AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, evidence, and interpretation clear.
entries.value: Utilisez AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, preuves, and interpretation clear.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: Utilise le voyage temporel avec l'IA, les conversations historiques et l'entraînement au débat pour explorer le contexte, les preuves, les arguments et les perspectives.

entries.source: Use AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.
entries.value: Utilisez AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.

entries.source: Use AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.
entries.value: Utilisez AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Civics Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Utilisez Art Appreciation Guide lorsque c’est le bon mode pour la tâche. Si vous voulez un parcours associé, essayez Civics Coach. Vous pouvez aussi parcourir le blog d’apprentissage IA pour les méthodes d’étude, l’apprentissage socratique, les flashcards, le jeu de rôle et le rappel actif.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Utilisez Art Appreciation Guide lorsque vous voulez une séance qui démarre vite tout en s’adaptant à vous. Le premier objectif n’est pas d’avoir l’air impressionnant. Il est de rendre la prochaine étape possible.

entries.source: Use badge names, criteria, tiers, and proof examples.
entries.value: Utilisez badge names, criteria, tiers, and proof examples.

entries.source: Use before/after snippets, revision priorities, and concise rationale.
entries.value: Utilisez before/after snippets, revision priorities, and concise rationale.

entries.source: Use Brainstorm Ideas to create several routes before choosing one.
entries.value: Utilisez Brainstorm Ideas to create several routes before choosing one.
